title: Game Engine — learning to think in systems
description: Started as an independent game developer, building multiplayer games with client/server architecture, inventory and quest systems, event-driven programming, and data persistence. This experience taught me how to break down complex problems, design interconnected systems, and learn independently.

title: Backend fundamentals
description: Developed a strong foundation in backend engineering using JavaScript, Node.js, and Express.js. Built REST APIs, implemented authentication and authorization systems, designed middleware pipelines, and learned how to structure maintainable backend applications.

title: Designing maintainable systems
description: Expanded into software architecture and security, exploring modular monoliths, clean architecture principles, API design, and secure application development. Gained experience with MongoDB, data modeling, JWT, RBAC, rate limiting, CORS, and common web security practices.

title: Moving toward production-ready systems
description: Currently deepening my knowledge in the areas that make systems reliable and scalable:
points: Load balancing, proxies, and CDN concepts
Clean Architecture and scalable backend design

title: Building expertise in distributed systems
points: Advanced system design and high-scale architectures
